Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.state AS state, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AS nhgis_tract_gisjoin, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.bldg_id = 51037 GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/ef11025304910ba131925f3b0cdeb0e8aa5c9385cf999289382cd6363cac4f8d/0a963158-4810-4afb-9e51-a588de8ec702/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
